channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: FBI Investigating After Malware Found Lurking in Steam PC Games
item.description: Feds are looking to hear from victims after several games on Valve’s Steam platform were found to be distributing malicious software.

item.title: Key Bitcoin price levels to watch as BTC nears new monthly highs
item.description: Bitcoin is on track for its strongest weekly return since its 2025 rally to new highs. Analysts highlight the price levels BTC must reach to sustain its current bullish momentum.

item.title: Trump Meme Coin Price, Trading Volume Skyrocket as Holders Vie for Exclusive Event Access
item.description: President Donald Trump's meme coin has surged by 35%, with top holders stacking Solana-based tokens to earn access to an exclusive event.

item.title: Kraken-Linked SPAC Could Target Crypto Firm Valued at Up to $10 Billion
item.description: The company is taking a broad look at crypto-native firms that could generate interest on Wall Street.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Price predictions 3/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin faced strong resistance at the $74,500 level, but the shallow price pullback could set the stage for a stronger breakout in BTC and altcoins.

item.title: Billionaire Investor Stanley Druckenmiller Bullish on Stablecoin Growth
item.description: Former hedge fund manager Stanley Druckenmiller expects stablecoins to take over payments systems in the next 10-15 years.

item.title: 'Gold is not a store of value anymore' — Mike McGlone predicts a 2008-like setup
item.description: According to the Bloomberg Intelligence strategist, the oil shock and rising volatility across commodities and crypto may foreshadow a broader correction in equities.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes mandate clarifying role and goals
item.description: The non-profit organization said the goal is to make Ethereum so decentralized that it could function even if the foundation ceases to exist.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: Strong Revenue and Real Trading Could Send HYPE to $150
item.description: Hayes said Hyperliquid’s strong revenue, real trading activity and disciplined token supply could push the token to new highs.

item.title: Ethereum accumulation wallets jump 30%: Will ETH price follow?
item.description: Ether’s road to recovery looked clearer, especially if the balance in Ethereum accumulation wallets and the staked supply continue rising at their current pace.

item.title: KuCoin launches perpetual futures tracking Tesla and Strategy stocks
item.description: The USDt-settled contracts allow traders to speculate on the price movements of the two companies’ shares around the clock without owning the underlying stocks.

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Alleged $800 Million North Korean IT Worker Fraud Operation
item.description: Six North Korean individuals and two entities were hit with U.S. sanctions over an alleged crypto-fueled fraud scheme targeting U.S. firms.

item.title: Bitcoin quickly drops 3.5% as fresh Iran escalation short-circuits crypto rally
item.description: Surging to a near one-month high of $74,000, bitcoin reversed back to just above $71,000 as news of U.S. military movements in the Middle East rattled risk assets.

item.title: One mysterious investor made $2.5 million profit in hours by betting big on the latest Trump gala news
item.description: A dormant crypto whale just bet $7 million on the Trump memecoin after a new Mar-a-Lago gala was announced, sparking a 60% rally for the struggling token.

item.title: MoonPay introduces Ledger-secured AI crypto agents to address wallet key risks
item.description: The feature allows users to verify and sign every transaction generated by an AI agent using a Ledger hardware device, ensuring private keys never leave the hardware signer.

item.title: PIP Labs Sheds Staff as Story Protocol Leans Into AI
item.description: The team behind Story Protocol has let go of several employees and contractors as it explores opportunities associated with AI agents.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes new mandate defining its role, core principles
item.description: The document comes at a point of transition for the organization, following shifts in the blockchain's technical roadmap and the resignation of a co-executive director.

item.title: Bitcoin miners saw the AI power crunch coming — and the nuclear revival
item.description: AI-driven data center demand is reviving nuclear power across the US, and Bitcoin miners were among the first to tap nuclear energy to run high-performance computing operations.

item.title: Stablecoins, bitcoin could reshape finance, Stanley Druckenmiller says
item.description: The billionaire investor said stablecoins could become the whole payment system in 10-15 years, and reiterated that crypto might replace the U.S. dollar as the global reserve currency.

item.title: Circle's USDC volumes top Tether's USDT for first time since 2019, prompting sell-side price target hike
item.description: Japanese investment bank Mizuho remains neutral on Circle, but lifted it price target to $120 from $100.

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $74K rematch as US PCE inflation boosts crypto, stocks
item.description: Bitcoin bulls squeezed the market toward $74,000 again as promising US inflation data buoyed risk assets, but BTC price forecasts stayed mixed.

item.title: This is the new EF Mandate. For many of you, the contents should be no surprise, and a clarification along the lines that we have been going and thinking for the past few months. But the clarification is nevertheless worth making. Ethereum is a unique object a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9aeFc4VG1tejU3Q2JITWlJbTFQT2szQ2VCSy00al9oWl9yQ244cXE1VlZwek9mX3FmMmlJWWxhZHdHRUtkcnFjOExVWVFiMmFqcFYxeGdtVHBlcHg2aVpYNmdGSXNwUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">This is the new EF Mandate. …

item.title: Dubai’s Token2049, TON Crypto Conferences Canceled as Iran Conflict Rages On
item.description: A pair of planned Dubai conferences, Token2049 and TON Connect, have been pulled from the calendar amid Middle East unrest.

item.title: Trump Meme Coin, Render and Pi See Double-Digit Rallies as Bitcoin Rises
item.description: As Bitcoin consolidates, select altcoins like Trump, Pi, and Render surge on specific catalysts and improving risk appetite.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $73,800, continuing to outperform since start of Iran war
item.description: Falling oil prices are helping, but a bounce seemed in the cards after some of the worst sentiment in bitcoin's history.

item.title: Crypto millionaire’s Nevis project offers residents $100 a month: FT
item.description: Olivier Janssens’ Destiny project offered Nevis residents $100 a month if the government approves the development, triggering sharp local criticism, the Financial Times reported.

item.title: U.S. sanctions 6 people, 2 companies that laundered $800 million in crypto for North Korea
item.description: The Treasury Department said North Korea infiltrated IT workers into U.S. businesses and channeled their wages back to the country to fund weapons of mass destruction programs.

item.title: Building with Bitcoin? Your users deserve the best. Pact Swap is just an API integration away from delivering your users a premium swap experience. Make sure that what they see is what they get. ⚡ Fast routing 🎯 Accurate prices 💳 Low fees - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9oRlpCS2NiNDdtUXd3Q1FLVENCS3JFLVJnUDBVMEZ4R0hwVS1qcDBJQUh4Wkp2cDRzSURuWmVvamtpbkR0RVpJTW1FQ2NUSXNpeGtGS3ZMbUNNRVN1S2Fn?oc=5" target="_blank">Building with Bitcoin? Your users dese…

item.title: DOJ and Europol take down SocksEscort network tied to crypto fraud
item.description: Law enforcement agencies seized 34 domains, 23 servers and froze $3.5 million in crypto linked to SocksEscort, a proxy service that hijacked 369,000 devices.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $73,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAxc3lqQ2wxUVllNl8tR1VtQ3pjcVZYVk01UWl0MVFvRUVaM2owZjcxWTVJUXRyY0VHdnA5a1VkRU5MQUlOMDhEbFM2Y3VoS0tWZW8xR3RQVUxRMzFtWmUxbHNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $73,000<…

item.title: Yield-bearing stablecoins surge as Washington fights over yield
item.description: Yield-bearing stablecoins are growing faster than the broader market as US lawmakers remain divided over how crypto yield should be regulated.

item.title: UK central bank is warming up to stablecoins, but says industry input is lacking
item.description: The Bank of England is open to fixes on its proposed stablecoin framework, but one official said it needs better feedback from crypto industry participants.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index jumps 3.7% as all constituents climb higher
item.description: Sui (SUI) gained 6.7% and Cardano (ADA) rose 5.8%, leading the index higher.

item.title: Prediction markets will scale as far as their resolution infrastructure allows
item.description: Prediction market volume scales every month, as resolution infrastructure becomes a bottleneck. Opaque outcomes drive capital to headline markets only.

item.title: Bitcoin's building steam and a $3 billion trigger could make it wild
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 13, 2026

item.title: Here’s why XRP bulls see an ‘explosive run’ to $2.55 next
item.description: XRP’s technical and onchain signals hint at a significant breakout, with bulls eyeing an “explosive” rally toward $2.55.

item.title: HSBC, Standard Chartered tipped for first Hong Kong stablecoin licenses: Report
item.description: Hong Kong is set to issue its first stablecoin issuer licenses, with HSBC and Standard Chartered likely among a “very small number” of initially approved issuers, local media reported.

item.title: Bitcoin outperforms stocks, tops $72,000 even as dollar strengthens
item.description: BTC climbed 2% to break through $72,000 while U.S. equity futures slipped and the dollar strengthened, as altcoins and AI tokens joined a broader crypto rally.

item.title: Token2049 postpones Dubai event to 2027 amid regional uncertainty
item.description: The crypto conference organizer said tickets will remain valid for the rescheduled April 2027 event, with holders also able to transfer tickets to the Singapore event.

item.title: Bitcoin ‘passing geopolitical stress test’ as BTC price spikes above $72K
item.description: Bitcoin price analysis saw conditions slowly "building” to support a breakout as BTC emerged as the strongest macro performer since the US and Israel-Iran war began.

item.title: Bitcoin holds above $71,000, defying rising dollar, oil and U.S. bond yields
item.description: Stronger dollar, rising Treasury yields, and tech equities treading water contrast with bitcoin’s resilience amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Sweden probes reported leak of e-government platform source code
item.description: Sweden is investigating a reported leak tied to CGI Sverige after hackers claimed they exposed source code from the country’s e-government platform.

item.title: China’s Alibaba joins stablecoin platform MetaComp’s $35M fundraise
item.description: MetaComp’s Pre-A+ funding round, backed by Alibaba and Spark Venture, brings the total capital raised to $35 million, with aims to expand its StableX Network globally.

item.title: Exclusive: The Dubai TOKEN2049 summit, originally scheduled for April 29-30, 2026, has been postponed to April 21-22, 2027. This comes after several locations in Dubai were attacked by Iranian drones and shrapnel, prompting many in the crypto industry to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBBZ0MtQzRXS0JlQklFY2NXbTZHVlJCdUU2VTllWHNBOTNZWmtwazVCNzdRcW5KRUtuaEhfQ1VfOFFhRG1uTDFIR2dad3dBNEE0NjJwZjhXMTVDLXFKRjAxME5VUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Exclusive: The Dubai TOKEN2049 s…

item.title: Bitcoin's recent crash to $60,000 warned stocks first – now they're following
item.description: Bitcoin has once again acted as a leading indicator for risk assets, plunging sharply before the ongoing global stock market swoon.

item.title: BlackRock’s new ether ETF for yield hungry investors debuts with $15 million in trading volume
item.description: The new ETHB fund launched with over $100 million in assets and traded more than $15 million on day one, offering investors exposure to ethereum plus staking rewards.

item.title: CFTC Moves to Rein In Prediction Markets With Guidance, Rulemaking Review
item.description: Chairman Selig has issued a staff advisory amid a formal rulemaking process, as states and Congress close in.

item.title: Pi rallies more than 30% after Kraken announces listing
item.description: Bybit previously declined to list the mobile crypto mining platform, with CEO Ben Zhou citing warnings from Chinese police that the project is a scam.

item.title: XRP jumps 3% as breakout above $1.39 ends early-2026 downtrend
item.description: Volume surged more than 300% during the move, per CoinDesk analytics data, with traders watching whether the token can hold the former resistance as support.

item.title: Adobe CEO Narayen Plans Exit as Tech Firms Restructure Around AI
item.description: The transition comes as generative AI reshapes the tech industry, forcing companies to rethink how they build products and run teams.

item.title: Bitcoin above $71,000, ETH, SOL, ADA zoom higher as cryptos shrugs off stock weakness
item.description: Majors posted modest gains Friday with BTC hovering near the top of its month-long range even as equities struggle under rising energy prices and geopolitical stress.

item.title: Why Bitcoin's Price Is at a Weekly High Despite Middle East Tensions
item.description: Bitcoin rose even as equities dropped, with analysts pointing to crypto-specific demand alongside geopolitical tensions driving energy markets higher.

item.title: White House Calls for Retraction of ABC Report Over Iran Drone Threat
item.description: Officials say the FBI alert cited by the network came from an unverified tip, as Iran deploys drones across the Middle East following U.S. and Israeli strikes.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to near $72,000 after Treasury Secretary Bessent attempts to calm oil fears
item.description: Bessent said the U.S. Treasury Department will provide temporary authorization to allow countries to purchase Russian oil currently in transit.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $72,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFA3SnhpZW40VVdwUk10UzB6Q1dhNGVkUlVBRGtFeHVLVE5vNldBTnBxRzJOM2FJbnkyTzZLSlpmcWxQeFlTaFZkNWlPOXVDUzhrOU1iSDN2eElnZHdjM1l1TFNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $72,000<…

item.title: The Promise of Ethereum: Introducing the EF Mandate
item.description: Dearest Friends, Today we are publishing the EF Mandate, a document that serves as part constitution, part manifesto, and part guide for the Ethereum Foundation. It is written primarily for the EF itself: to be clear about what we are here…

item.title: Crypto Trader Loses Nearly $50M in Aave Trade, Protocol Offers $600K Fee Refund
item.description: A $50 million USDT trade executed through Aave’s interface returned just 324 AAVE tokens after a user went ahead despite a high-slippage warning.

item.title: Stricter MiCA rules could thin crypto industry across the EU, says Swiss wealth manager
item.description: Crypto wealth manager Swissborg gets MiCA approval and prepares to move its European operations to France while targeting growth in markets including Germany, Italy and Spain.

item.title: Google's New AI Tool Predicts Flash Floods Up to 24 Hours in Advance
item.description: Google's Gemini-powered Groundsource AI system mines decades of news reports, powering real-time flash flood warnings in 150 countries.
